vocab.def: a vehicle that travels through space
a machine that can do things automatically
a dead person that comes back to life in stories
many meteors falling through the sky
technology used to create movie magic
a person who puts makeup on actors for films
objects used to fight or attack
one part of a movie or play
to stay alive through a dangerous situation
something that gives power to an engine
food, water, and equipment needed to survive

blanks.l2: Alan Spacey was in his spaceship when the aliens attacked.

s: to make the alien planets look real.
blanks.l2: The film used amazing special effects to make the alien planets look real.

s: was putting makeup on Alan Spacey when he sneezed.
blanks.l2: The makeup artist was putting makeup on Alan Spacey when he sneezed.
They needed to find weapons / supplies / fuel before the zombies arrived.

s: of the film was the most exciting.
blanks.l2: The director said the last scene of the film was the most exciting.

order.l2: I was sleeping when the zombies attacked.
She was watching TV when the aliens invaded.
He was fighting the aliens when a meteor shower destroyed his spaceship.
The makeup artist was doing my makeup when I sneezed.
She was reading a book when the robot appeared.
He was looking for supplies when the zombies came.
We were hiding in the forest when the aliens landed.
A brave and determined person can survive a zombie apocalypse.

freewrite.prompt: Use past continuous: What was Alan Spacey doing when the meteor shower destroyed his spaceship?
a: He was fighting the aliens when a meteor shower destroyed his spaceship.
He was flying the spaceship when a meteor shower destroyed it.
Alan Spacey was looking for fuel when the meteor shower destroyed his spaceship.
He was sleeping when the meteor shower destroyed his spaceship.
He was escaping the aliens when a meteor shower hit his spaceship.
freewrite.explanation: Past continuous: He was + verb-ing + when + simple past for the interruption.

freewrite.prompt: Use past continuous: What were you doing when the zombie attack started?
a: I was sleeping when the zombie attack started.
I was eating dinner when the zombie attack started.
I was watching TV when the zombies attacked.
I was studying when the zombies attacked.
I was running home when the zombie attack started.
freewrite.explanation: Past continuous: I was + verb-ing + when + simple past.

freewrite.prompt: Write two sentences about a famous inventor using the passive tense.
a: The airplane was invented by the Wright Brothers. They were brave and ambitious inventors.
The telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell. He was a determined and clever inventor.
The World Wide Web was invented by Tim Berners-Lee. It was developed in 1989.
freewrite.explanation: Passive: object + was + past participle + by + agent. Use two sentences.

repair.broken: He was fight the aliens when a meteor shower destroys his spaceship.

errors.explanation: Past continuous: was + verb-ING (was fighting, not was fight).
Simple past for the completed interrupting event: destroyed.

a: He was fighting the aliens when a meteor shower destroyed his spaceship.

repair.broken: We was hiding in the forest when the aliens land.

errors.explanation: We (plural) takes 'were', not 'was': we were hiding.
Simple past for the completed event: landed.

a: We were hiding in the forest when the aliens landed.
